visual_summary: A simple blog card component displaying post title, description, updated date, and reading time. It typically appears on a blog or news site to present recent articles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: BlogCard
Description: A simple blog card component displaying post title, description, updated date, and reading time. It typically appears on a blog or news site to present recent articles.
Style: minimal
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: blog, card, post

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/BlogCard.astro
---
import type { CollectionEntry } from 'astro:content'

import { ArrowRight } from '@lucide/astro'

import { calculateReadingTime } from '../utils/readingTime'

import FormattedDate from './FormattedDate.astro'

interface Props {
  post: CollectionEntry<'blog'>
}

const { post } = Astro.props

const { data, body } = post

const { slug, title, description, updatedDate } = data

const readingTime = calculateReadingTime(body ?? '')
---

<a href={`/blog/${slug}`} c
